title: pilea stolonifera
intro: Pilea stolonifera, also known as creeping pilea, is a type of plant in the Urticaceae family, characterized by its ability to spread and form dense mats through underground stolons. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pilea stolonifera include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in salves and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
